title: eleocharis verrucosa
intro: Eleocharis verrucosa, also known as wart sedge, is a perennial aquatic plant species belonging to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis verrucosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
